title: task
description:
python/src/lichen/crypto/edhoc.py - Multiple CBOR sequence decoding sites lack bounds checks:
- Lines 297-299 (process_message_2): Assumes items has >= 2 elements
- Lines 506-511 (process_message_1): Assumes items has >= 4 elements  
- Lines 593-595 (process_message_3): Assumes pt3_items has >= 2 elements
- Line 301: No length check on g_y_ciphertext_2 before slicing

Failure scenario: Attacker sends malformed EDHOC message with truncated CBOR sequence, causes IndexError crash. While the protocol fails closed (no security bypass), error messages are unhelpful and could enable DoS.

Fix: Add explicit length checks before array indexing, raise ValueError with descriptive message.
close_reason: Fixed: Added CBOR sequence length checks before indexing in process_message_1, process_message_2, and process_message_3 to reject malformed EDHOC messages with descriptive ValueError
